goal: Converge the official runtime mainline contract around createAgent plus session store, checkpointer, approval interrupt/resume, memory, and MCP host composition without large-scale runtime rewrites.
successCriteria: A single recommended runtime path is explicit in code-facing docs and examples.
Runtime mainline contract is backed by focused tests and a smokeable story.
Experimental orchestration surfaces remain clearly non-mainline.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No new multi-agent public surface in this package.

liveVerifyStatus.note: This package converges runtime contract, docs, and focused verification around the mainline story without depending on broad live verification.
